programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Herman the Hermit Crab takes up residence in Adam's locker. Adam and Jake attempt to return herman to his underwater lair, but Herman relentlessly clings to his new home.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3

programme.desc: Rodney's special time at the circus with Darlene is ruined by the arrival of Rodney's Cousin Eddie.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1

programme.desc: When a cereal box provides the location of buried treasure, Andy and Rodney must make peace with their arch-enemies Kyle and Salty Mike to dig it up.

programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host Dwayne Johnson. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: One Win

programme.title: The World of the Married Ep1
programme.desc: Ji Sun-woo, a successful doctor, is married to Lee Tae-oh, an aspiring filmmaker. Their marriage, however, starts to fall apart when Lee engages in an extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Big Match
programme.desc: A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

programme.title: The Favor

programme.title: No Other Choice
programme.desc: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a paper mill manager has no other choice but to turn to violence to eliminate those who stand in the way of his dream life.

programme.title: Single in Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho is a famous influencer who praises living a single life. Hyeon-Jin is an editor who is desperate about finding her partner. The two meets while working together for a book.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates South Korea’s largest crime organization and spends eight years rising in the ranks. When the head of the organization is killed, he becomes torn between his loyalties.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A man's obsession with spying on people comes back to hunt him when he begins to stalk a mysterious instagram star.

programme.title: Cart

programme.title: Joseon Chefs

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.

programme.title: The King's Letters
programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.title: 4PM
programme.desc: A couple moved to a new house, dreaming of a peaceful country life. But they face a terrifying reality due to their neighbor, who visits them at the same time every day with just silence…

programme.title: Punch-Drunk Love
programme.desc: Bok-seo gave up to be a soccer player after an injury. He meets Bok-hee and falls in love with her. Bok-hee feels unsure but she appreciates his sincerity, leading to something special...

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When Feather is taken by a group of what appear to be zombie dragons, Alex finds her inner hero and rescues her friend.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil learns no one on the farm thinks he's fun, he sets out to prove them all wrong... by building a crazy amusement park.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Eep and Dawn find a stranded egg, they eagerly take it in as their new pet, but when they learn the egg is not what it seems, they have to return it before it becomes dangerous.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug overhears Thunk accidentally call Phil "Dad", he tries to reconnect with Thunk by taking him to the natural spectacle known as "Big Shine."

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Eugene discovers the Lair and demands a dragon of his own.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The dragon riders must sneak a very sick Magma Breather into the ICARIS infirmary.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The Sky Torcher & Flame Throwers invade the Crystal Realm. Tom must conquer his demons and bond with the Fault Ripper to defeat the Sky Torcher.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Despite the Spy Racers’ best efforts, Dann is able to set off one of her earthquake devices causing all of L.A. to shake. Now it’s a race against the clock as they embark on their final mission to stop Dann and her super-soldiers for good!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the final battle against Morando, Aja and Krel must make an unexpected sacrifice to win the day to save their Akiridion and Earthen homes.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.desc: Lucky's competitive side comes out at the Frontier Fillies' Summer Outdoor Jubilee when the PALs meet the BUDs -- a group of talented young rivals.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: The PALs are determined to place first in a race for the coveted Frontier Fillies Legacy Pin. But the BUDs are willing to do anything to win.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux return to the crater from their travels to find that D-Structs has taken over and built a huge wall to keep them out.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Power Outage – Part 3: Escape from Scare School Things worsen when a leprechaun, Razznik, steals the magical cleptor that now holds all of Scare School's powers. Power Outage – Part 4: The Final Battle On a hunt for ghostly powers, the evil leprechaun orders Deedstown to hand over Casper's uncles, OR ELSE.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ghost in the Gallery After hearing reports of a ghost stealing artwork from the Deedstown Museum, Casper becomes convinced that his uncles are involved. Wart on the Nose When Professor Thurdigree Burns comes down with dragon flu, Casper, Mantha and Ra are tasked with finding a cure.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: During a big thunderstorm in Nutwood, the swarm of bees lose their home. Bill badger attempts to reconstruct their hive with the help of his tool box but unfortunately it falls to pieces. With another thunderstorm looming, will the bees get a new home in time?

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert is off to join his friends in the wood, where he learns that Raggety has just heard the most extraordinary bird-song - from presumably an unusual bird. What is it doing in Nutwood? Bill learns that many birds migrate from the Far South to spend the summer in the Far Far North. The unusual visitor must have been doing so but got lost and cut off from its flock. Rupert determines that they should help the lost bird on its way. Thanks to Ming and Rupert's car, they are finally able to do so...

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he’s cut out to be a paramedic--until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene’s debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn’t ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab’s introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman has to pick someone for his school project, he and Peabody help Hobson do everything on his life bucket list live on the show

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman makes a million-dollar pledge to his school's charity to win an awesome video game, he didn't realize they actually expect him to pay

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When Feather is taken by a group of what appear to be zombie dragons, Alex finds her inner hero and rescues her friend.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Thunder train a new species of aggressive tidal dragons to help the other riders put out a forest fire threatening ICARIS.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Julien, Clover, Mort and Maurice become music sensations overnight, but the band breaks up over Julien and Clover's non-stop fighting

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After Uncle King Julien turned Pancho into a deadly killer so he could take back his throne, King Julien must save the kingdom before it's too late

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: As he tries to restore the magic spell that will protect San Lorenzo, Puss accidentally brings Artephius's macramé owl shop to life.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: While searching for items missing from the treasure house, Puss enlists the help of the Scimitar, an evil sword that turns its wielder wicked.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Viggo gets angry at the dragon riders continually interfering with his business and uses a deep sea dragon, the Submaripper, to control Berk's trade.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil learns no one on the farm thinks he's fun, he sets out to prove them all wrong... by building a crazy amusement park.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Eep and Dawn find a stranded egg, they eagerly take it in as their new pet, but when they learn the egg is not what it seems, they have to return it before it becomes dangerous.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug overhears Thunk accidentally call Phil "Dad", he tries to reconnect with Thunk by taking him to the natural spectacle known as "Big Shine."

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Eugene discovers the Lair and demands a dragon of his own.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The dragon riders must sneak a very sick Magma Breather into the ICARIS infirmary.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The Sky Torcher & Flame Throwers invade the Crystal Realm. Tom must conquer his demons and bond with the Fault Ripper to defeat the Sky Torcher.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Despite the Spy Racers’ best efforts, Dann is able to set off one of her earthquake devices causing all of L.A. to shake. Now it’s a race against the clock as they embark on their final mission to stop Dann and her super-soldiers for good!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the final battle against Morando, Aja and Krel must make an unexpected sacrifice to win the day to save their Akiridion and Earthen homes.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Secrets unfold when the team uses Haggar’s map to ventur eto a mythical planet

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When The Croods experience the first-ever sugar-rush, they're hooked on the delicious new food; Grug is labeled a zombie after taking the first nap.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Grug won't let her join his winning team, Eep forms her own underdog team in the first-ever sports competition – Ahhh! Valley's annual Egg Toss.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: Lucky's competitive side comes out at the Frontier Fillies' Summer Outdoor Jubilee when the PALs meet the BUDs -- a group of talented young rivals.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: The PALs are determined to place first in a race for the coveted Frontier Fillies Legacy Pin. But the BUDs are willing to do anything to win.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux return to the crater from their travels to find that D-Structs has taken over and built a huge wall to keep them out.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Power Outage – Part 3: Escape from Scare School Things worsen when a leprechaun, Razznik, steals the magical cleptor that now holds all of Scare School's powers. Power Outage – Part 4: The Final Battle On a hunt for ghostly powers, the evil leprechaun orders Deedstown to hand over Casper's uncles, OR ELSE.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ghost in the Gallery After hearing reports of a ghost stealing artwork from the Deedstown Museum, Casper becomes convinced that his uncles are involved. Wart on the Nose When Professor Thurdigree Burns comes down with dragon flu, Casper, Mantha and Ra are tasked with finding a cure.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: During a big thunderstorm in Nutwood, the swarm of bees lose their home. Bill badger attempts to reconstruct their hive with the help of his tool box but unfortunately it falls to pieces. With another thunderstorm looming, will the bees get a new home in time?

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert is off to join his friends in the wood, where he learns that Raggety has just heard the most extraordinary bird-song - from presumably an unusual bird. What is it doing in Nutwood? Bill learns that many birds migrate from the Far South to spend the summer in the Far Far North. The unusual visitor must have been doing so but got lost and cut off from its flock. Rupert determines that they should help the lost bird on its way. Thanks to Ming and Rupert's car, they are finally able to do so...

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. But when the animals go wild in the snow, Melman’s future-paramedic skills are put to the test during an outbreak of stubbed toes and boo-boos. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he’s cut out to be a paramedic--until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene’s debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn’t ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab’s introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: It’s Kate’s birthday and everyone in the habitat has something amazing planned- but Melman’s worried that his homemade/hoof-made gift won’t measure up. While on a no-holds barred quest to get Kate her favorite cupcakes, Melman learns the gift doesn’t matter, as long as it comes from the heart.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister’s place in the games.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter’s Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles 2

programme.title: The Last Overland 1
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.title: Earth 1
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the dramatic moment nearly all life on Earth was wiped out.

programme.title: A Perfect Planet 1
programme.desc: From the frozen poles to the searing deserts, The Sun shows how animals have come up with strategies to survive the uneven amounts of sunlight that fall on our planet.

programme.title: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall 1
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: The Last Overland 1
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles 2
programme.desc: Nick's journey begins in Prague, where he learns about the city's remarkable 600-year-old astronomical clock from its keeper.

programme.title: Extreme Fishing with Robson Green 3
programme.desc: In Senegal and Guinea Bissau, Robson fishes for red snapper, horse-eye jack, leerfish and more.

programme.title: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall 1
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Round Playlist
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: Krazy Rich Korean
programme.desc: Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world? Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Agent of Death
programme.desc: After undergoing a secret government experiment, CIA operative Tara gains the ability to shapeshift into anyone through DNA transformation, making her the ultimate infiltrator. When her father is murdered and evidence points to her own agency, she is forced to go rogue. Now, she must stop stolen uranium from triggering a global nuclear catastrophe.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we’ll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We’ll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Contestants face a pressure test for Immunity designed by Dessert Masters winner John Demetrios. As a famous dessert chef, it stands to reason that today’s cook will be a sweet mountain to climb.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s viral week and contestants are vying for immunity once again, challenged to create the ultimate ‘scrollable’ deli meats sandwich followed by a viral dish mash-up.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Hey, Babe! With over 13 million social media followers and three billion views on YouTube, online superstar and chef of over 20 years’ experience Andy Cooks (aka chef Andy Hearnden) sets two challenges.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make an Israeli-inspired, tahini-based yoghurt sauce with harissa, served over charred chicken and family-style pitta.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Derek sees big profit potential when he buys a crumbling old house in a nice neighborhood. Chauncey is skeptical of the half-finished work and the small square footage. Was this all a big mistake?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: When we watch comedians on television, they often seem approachable and friendly. But have you ever wondered what their homes look like and how they’re decorated? Today’s theme is "Comedians' Homes."

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Jon's huge, 25-year-old shoulder-blade bump is ruining his family beach days and risking his health. April wants the wedding of her dreams but feels hideous in gowns due to her bumpy underarm "threast".

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The remaining five home cooks take on two rounds of challenges that determine who will move on to the Finals.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Theresa Caputo is back and goes global with her gift of communicating with the dead. With a tour coming up, she decides to do a reading in town before heading off, ends up getting a surprise from clients.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar buys a zombie sight unseen, shocking his business partner Sam, especially having known there may be a sinkhole under the property, threatening the profitability of this flip.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: To fight desertification, the Earth-Cleaning Bros start planting trees, but finding water and the right spot in endless sand is no easy task. Finally, they begin digging with high spirits.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home (S3)

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home (S4)

programme.desc: Katie always viewed kelp as a seaweed to avoid while swimming.

programme.title: Beach Bites with Katie Lee (S3)
programme.desc: Katie Lee tours some SC beach towns and tries crab cakes eggs Benedict, local shrimp and gelato.

programme.title: Beach Bites with Katie Lee (S3)
programme.desc: Katie Lee gets a lamb burger, perfect nachos and Pacific spiny lobster off the coast of CA.

programme.title: 24 in 24: Last Chef Standing (S1)
programme.desc: Twenty-four elite chefs enter the arena where they will spend the next 24 hours cooking, and they'll have to use their speed to impress judge Jet Tila.

programme.title: Hot Dish with Franco (S1)
programme.desc: Franco Noriega serves up brunch! He whips up his piled-high avocado toast, and an elevated take on a Tex-Mex huevos rancheros with fried tortilla strips.

programme.title: Ayesha's Home Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Ayesha Curry prepares a big Italian meal as she and Stephen entertain their friends who are also their daughter Riley's godparents.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games (S19)
programme.desc: Three DDD family duos compete in Flavortown for the last spot in the tournament finale.

programme.title: Man V. Food (S4)
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies

programme.title: Man V. Food (S4)
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary trek brings him to Providence, Rhode Island, where he meets the challenge of an entire brunch incorporated into a big brioche doughnut

programme.title: From the Source (S1)
programme.desc: Katie is inspired to explore mushrooms beyond the standard supermarket.

programme.title: From the Source (S1)
programme.desc: Inspired by a favorite seafood restaurant in Spain, Katie accompanies a commercial fishing vessel to experience sustainable fishing methods first-hand.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate (S12)
programme.desc: From savory to sweet, it's pies galore, and Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate (S12)

programme.desc: Giada and her daughter prepare a casual brunch after paddleboarding.

programme.title: Giada on the Beach (S1)

programme.title: The Globe (S1)
programme.desc: The competing chefs travel virtually to Florence, Italy, and must make pasta from scratch. Then three chefs move on to Memphis to make low-and-slow barbecue.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Deals
programme.desc: A weekly program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power

programme.title: Rear Window
programme.desc: When professional photographer J.B. “Jeff” Jeffries is confined to a wheelchair, he becomes obsessed with watching the private dramas of his neighbours play out across the courtyard.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

programme.title: From here to Eternity
programme.desc: A brooding loner finds love and turmoil on the eve of the bombing of Pearl Harbor's bombings.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.desc: Clint Eastwood is the "Man With No Name," who teams up with equally lethal Lee Van Cleef in pursuit of a sadistic killer and his band of desperadoes in this non-stop action classic.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Ginormica, The Missing Link, Insectosaurous and B.O.B. join forces to fight back when aliens attack. Featuring Reese Witherspoon, Seth Rogen, Hugh Laurie and Will Arnett.

programme.title: Anchors Aweigh
programme.desc: Two sailors (Sinatra and Kelly) in Hollywood looking for glamorous movie starlets find romance, dance with a cartoon mouse and help a young starlet get discovered--all during one shore leave.

programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Jennifer moves into a new apartment after leaving her abusive husband. As she starts life anew, something keeps biting her when she sleeps, leading her to be sleep deprived, paranoid and paralyzed with fear of the unseen.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer

Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When an 85-year-old man passes away after years of failing health, authorities quickly rule it a natural death and close the case.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: A local news story reignites a decades-old cold case, leading investigators to question a close-knit circle of friends who they believe are hiding the truth about the disappearance of a 25-year-old man.

programme.title: Women on Death Row
programme.desc: Shawna Forde was convicted for a 2009 crime that resulted in the violent murders of Raul Flores and his 9-year-old daughter Brisenia. She was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A boater goes off the deep end; a naked man causes traffic chaos; a police uniform-swiper gets taken to the cleaners; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man calls 911 on the cops; a woman is accused of stealing a horse and buggy; a man allegedly trespasses and shoots rats in a neighbour's yard; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Travel blogger Carla Stefaniak went to Costa Rica to celebrate her 36th birthday. But when she was to arrive back home to Miami, her awaiting loved ones realised she never got on the plane.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: An elderly woman gets arrested for domestic battery after fighting with her sister. Meanwhile in Virginia Beach, a 19-year-old boy gets extradited from Miami after missing his court date.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: When one of Redlands, California's newest residents goes missing, the distraught community bands together to help find her.

programme.title: Murder At the Motel
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A judge lashes out at a defence attorney who refers to his drunk driving client as a hero; a religious leader convicted of sexually abusing minors hears it from his victims; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A woman whose husband made her behead her lover testifies against him in court; a judge chastises a lawyer who called him biased; a sexual abuse victim faces her attacker in court; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Before he hunted down his first victim in the wilds of Alaska, Robert Hansen was working at his father's bakery in a small town in Iowa, slowly developing an animosity towards women.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: One of the summer season's seminal events, the Hot Summer Nights classic car show, rolls into town for a day of fun, but things turn really hot that night when there is an outbreak of bar fights.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After a barrage of gunfire leaves three men dead in a residential neighbourhood, Gwinnett detectives use every available resource to identify the killer.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: Tulsa detectives investigate how a young rapper was found shot dead on the street of an affluent suburban neighbourhood. The defence accuses the prosecution's key eyewitness of pulling the trigger.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: An altercation in a casino parking lot leads to murder when friends abandon reason for revenge.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: Magazine

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. Lacoste reinvents itself under the leadership of Pelagia Kolotouros. Patient and meticulous, restorer Marie-Cecile Kfouri brings frescoes and old canvases back to life.

programme.title: 6H Info

programme.title: Telematin

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: Magazine

programme.title: L'echappee Belge
programme.desc: From Charleville-Mezieres to the Langres plateau, Adrien Joveneau and comedian Manon Lepomme travel to the headwaters of the Meuse, exploring its heritage, nature and local encounters.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre SA Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des ailes
programme.desc: We set off to meet some of Provence's exceptional men and women. Craftsmen, architects or chefs, they enrich the heritage and identity of their region, Provence, thanks to their skills and talent.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
